testcase.name: test_put_profile_with_gender_education

failure.message: AssertionError: gender not persisted: {'phone': '+919876543210', 'company': 'AcmeCorp', 'designation': 'Senior Engineer', 'experience_years': 5, 'expertise': ['Python'], 'current_location': 'Bangalore', 'skills': ['Python'], 'phone_verified': False, 'phone_verified_at': None} assert None == 'male' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9b24feda0c0>('gender') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9b24feda0c0> = {'company': 'AcmeCorp', 'current_location': 'Bangalore', 'designation': 'Senior Engineer', 'experience_years': 5, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration28_pro_profile_view_edit.py:108: in test_put_profile_with_gender_education assert p.get("gender") == "male", f"gender not persisted: {p}" E AssertionError: gender not persisted: {'phone': '+919876543210', 'company': 'AcmeCorp', 'designation': 'Senior Engineer', 'experience_years': 5, 'expertise': ['Python'], 'current_location': 'Bangalore', 'skills': ['Python'], 'phone_verified': False, 'phone_verified_at': None} E assert None == 'male' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9b24feda0c0>('gender') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9b24feda0c0> = {'company': 'AcmeCorp', 'current_location': 'Bangalore', 'designation': 'Senior Engineer', 'experience_years': 5, ...}.get

testcase.name: test_pro_missing_fields_excludes_photo

failure.message: AssertionError: Backend still flagging 'Profile Photo' as missing — spec says it should be optional. missing=['Alternate Gmail Address', 'Profile Photo'] assert 'Profile Photo' not in ['Alternate Gmail Address', 'Profile Photo']

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration28_pro_profile_view_edit.py:132: in test_pro_missing_fields_excludes_photo assert "Profile Photo" not in missing, ( E AssertionError: Backend still flagging 'Profile Photo' as missing — spec says it should be optional. missing=['Alternate Gmail Address', 'Profile Photo'] E assert 'Profile Photo' not in ['Alternate Gmail Address', 'Profile Photo']
